title: Compact Iron Farm
description: A block that you can build to have a compact iron farm. every 30 seconds it will spawn 3-5 iron, just like a normal iron farm
body: This mod adds a block that acts like a iron farm, the compact iron farm. it spawns 3-5 iron every 30 seconds. But it is very hard to build. you will need 3 beds, 5 diamonds, and 3 iron.
